title: Chapter 28
content:
Chapter 28: Chapter 28: The Trident

On the other side of the Sect, an elder rushed toward a room where the sect leader stays. In front of a closed door, Elder Alder bow then immediately said.

"Sect Leader, Disciple Alder, here to report something important

.

"

"Elder Alder, what is it? I have a guest now. Is it really important

—

?" The Sect Leader said try to dismiss Elder Alder. However, Elder Alder didn’t let it finish.

"Sect Leader, Outer Disciple Damon can use sword intent!" Elder Alder said his voice was full of seriousness.

"WHAAT?!!" A shout can be heard from inside the room. "Sword Intent? Are you certain about this, Elder Alder?"

"I know it may sound like I am cracking a crazy joke, but I can promise you that I am absolutely serious in this matter. I also doubted it at first — I mean, who wouldn’t doubt their eyes if they saw an 18-year-old using Sword Intent? If I never saw it with my own eyes, then I wouldn’t believe it even if you told me while beating me to death!" Elder Alder was reassured by his seriousness.

"An 18-year-old Sword master... Is it Damon that pass the selection yesterday?" the sect leader asked to make sure.

"Yes, sect leader, he is the one that you have an eye on and sent disciple Mio and Mia." Elder Alder reply.

"Hahahahah! Good, good. I had an interest in him because of his mysterious spiritual roots and his mastery of sword qi, as your report, but look like he gave me more surprise that I didn’t expect." Elder Alder can hear the happy voice of the sect leader, but he gives him another report.

"But we have a problem, sect leader... Disciple Damon killed disciple Jack Frostborn.

"Jack? Selene’s brother?"

"Yes, this will incur the wrath of the Frostborn Family. Once this news reaches them, I’m sure they will take revenge, and I don’t know how Elder Selene will respond. "

"I see, I got it, I will take care of this, and about Selene, you don’t have to worry about it, that girl is not the type that really cares about something like this. You may go." The sect leader dismisses Elder Alder.

"Yes!" Elder Alder left the room.

****

Meanwhile, inside the room, a voice can be heard.

"Ho~ Ho~ Ho~, looks like I’m in the right time to hear something interesting~."

The voice came from a beautiful, mature woman with pale skin and huge breasts who sat in front of the sect leader of Azure Dragon Sect.

The black dress that clung to showed off her ample cleavage, the pale skin, and the seductive curve of her body, down to a slim waist and culminating in wide hips.

The curve of her voluptuous bottom was visible as her tight dress hugged her body, her plump, pale thighs proudly displayed by vertical slits in her dress that revealed glimmers of jade skin.

Her full lips, painted a vibrant red, flashed a seductive smile.

Hearing her respond, the sect leader couldn’t help but ask.

"What are you planning to do, Mei?"

"Ohh~ Come on, Hector~, You know me for a long time, you know what I’m gonna do~." Mei said in a teasing way.

"Haah... Well, I’m planning to secretly point a protector for him anyway, since you are interested, why don’t you do it?" as he looked at Mei with a helpless expression.

"Well~, let me see him first if he’s really interesting. I don’t mind being his protector, but if not, you can do it," her eyes gleaming with interest.

"Whatever, just tell me if you’re not gonna do it."

"Okay~" she stood up and vanished.

"Haah... what troublesome woman you are..."

****

Inside Damon’s Villa, Damon and Ariel lay on the bed, both naked. They just had another round of intense sex.

Ariel was sleeping while her arm hugged on to Damon. While Damon hand in the air, he was scrolling through the lust store.

’Hmm... with the current condition, I can buy most things from the store, but I still need real money. It’s kind of a waste to use everything with lust point.’

Then he looked at Ariel and remembered what she said when he asked her what she wanted to do from now on.

’I want to become stronger, to prove that to prove to my family that I’m fit to become a cultivator and make them regret that they sold me out. And from now on, I don’t want to feel that powerless and scared again.’

Then he looks at Ariel’s status.

[Name: Ariel Aquaria]

[Age: 17]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Eighth Level]

[Relationship: In Love]

[Interest: 850/1000]

[Chastity: Claim by Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Water: 40, Spear: 50]

[Spiritual Roots: Sea Spiritual Roots] [Mortal Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Sea Princess] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Physique: Body of Sea Princess] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Traits: Sensitive Body, Graceful, Young Lady, Kind, Loyal, Lustful]

’Her naive trait gone, look like the incident drove her to be better. Then let me make you even stronger. Damon pondered the matter, a smirk touching his lips.’

He searched the weapon section and found it.

[The Trident]

[Description: A legendary spear of the sea. A spear, once wielded by the Sea Princess. Now only those who have Sea Princess blood can wield it. It’s an artifact of the sea. Grow along with the owner. Indestructible.]

[Artifact]

[Price: 250,000,000,000]

’System, buy this using the weapon coupon.’

[You bought The Trident. -1 weapon coupon]

A flicker of golden light shimmered in the air, coalescing until a weapon of immense majesty materialized before him.

The Trident hung suspended in the dim room, its surface a swirling abyss of deep, ocean-blue metal that seemed to catch and hold the ambient light.

Its three prongs were honed to such sharpness they appeared to slice through the very fabric of the air, radiating an ancient, cold authority befitting a relic of the sea.

Damon rose silently, avoiding any sound. He glanced at Ariel, sleeping gracefully, then placed the Trident beside her.

The artifact buzzed recognizing her bloodline. After tucking a note against the spear, he slipped away. He wore his disciple robes before stepping out of the villa.
